header.title: Complete your order
header.description: Review your delivery information, payment method, and confirm your order.

validation.requiredContact: Please enter your first name, last name, and phone number!
validation.requiredAddress: Please select province/city, district, ward, and enter your detailed address!

pickup.name: Receive on website
pickup.description: Come to the shop to receive the product and pay directly

contact.name: Private contact
contact.description: We will contact you to agree on the delivery method

transfer.name: Bank transfer
transfer.description: Pay first by bank transfer, then receive the product

vnpay.name: VNPay
vnpay.description: Pay via VNPay gateway (ATM, Visa, QR)

sepay.name: Sepay
sepay.description: Bank transfer with automatic confirmation via Sepay

contact.name: Agreement by contact
contact.description: Payment method will be agreed when we contact you

contactForm.title: Contact information
contactForm.description: Enter your information so the shop can confirm and process your order.

address.title: Delivery address
address.description: Select each address level to reduce mistakes. If your order does not require physical delivery, you can leave this section blank.
address.loadError: Could not load the Vietnam address list. You can temporarily enter your address manually.
address.manualPlaceholder: Example: house number, street, ward, district, province/city...
address.detailPlaceholder: House number, street name, building, alley...

placeholders.notes: Describe the product you want to buy, preferred delivery time, or special requests...

orderSummary.title: Your order
orderSummary.description: Review your products and total amount before confirming.

paymentForm.title: Payment method
paymentForm.description: Choose a suitable payment method to complete your order.

transfer.title: Bank transfer information
transfer.description: Please transfer using the information below so the shop can confirm your order.
transfer.afterTransferNote: After transferring, you can continue placing the order. The shop will contact the registered phone number to confirm payment.

paymentForm.securityNote: Payment is processed through a secure connection to protect your information.

message.sepayOrderCreated: Sepay order created. Please transfer with the exact reference.

reviewOrder.title: Confirm order
reviewOrder.description: Review your information before submitting the order request.

payment.title: Payment method
payment.onlineNote: You will be redirected to the {{name}} payment page after confirming. Please do not close your browser during payment.
payment.sepayNote: After creating the order, transfer the exact amount with the order reference. The Sepay webhook will confirm the order when the incoming transaction arrives.

sepay.title: Sepay payment
sepay.missingBankInfo: No active bank information is configured. Please configure Bank Info in admin or use the dev simulation button.
sepay.description: When a Sepay webhook matches the order reference and amount, the order will move to paid automatically.
sepay.noQr: No QR image is configured. Please transfer manually using the information next to this panel.
